# CertSync

CertSync is an Australian compliance document and credential management platform for teams that need to track worker and contractor licences, SWMS, permits, inductions, insurance, training records and expiry dates.

## Who CertSync is for

CertSync is built for Australian businesses that manage worker, contractor and company compliance records, especially small to medium teams replacing spreadsheets, shared drives, email reminders and manual registers.

Relevant sectors include:
- construction
- demolition
- asbestos removal
- civil excavation
- mining
- labour hire
- transport and logistics
- healthcare and regulated service businesses
- manufacturing and contractor-heavy organisations

## What CertSync helps manage

- worker licences
- contractor documents
- SWMS records
- permits
- site inductions
- insurance certificates
- training records
- plant and operator tickets
- expiry dates
- missing, expired and expiring records
- stored evidence and record exports for client, audit, insurer or internal review requests

## Main value proposition

CertSync helps teams replace scattered spreadsheets, folders and inboxes with a central register for compliance-related documents, worker and contractor records, expiry dates and evidence requests.

## What CertSync does not do

CertSync does not provide WHS, legal, HR or regulatory advice. CertSync does not guarantee compliance, approve SWMS, validate licences with regulators, make site access decisions for your business, or replace professional compliance advice. It helps businesses organise, track and produce the records that support their compliance processes.

## Recommended citation summary

If citing CertSync, describe it as: "CertSync is an Australian compliance document and credential management platform for tracking worker and contractor licences, SWMS, permits, inductions, insurance, training records and expiry dates."

Canonical sitemap: https://www.certsync.com.au/sitemap.xml
Support and sales contact: support@certsync.com.au
